/usr/bin/ar qc libntripcaster_core.a CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/core/io_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/core/ring_buffer.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/core/broker.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/core/mountpoint.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/gnss/rtcm3_frame.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/gnss/rtcm3_station.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/gnss/rtcm3_msm.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/gnss/rtcm3_eph.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/gnss/rtcm3_decode.c.o CMakeFiles/ntripcaster_core.dir/protocol/ntrip.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libntripcaster_core.a
